seoTitle: Duffy vs Dunlop — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Duffy and Dunlop. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Duffy and Dunlop.
heading: Duffy vs Dunlop — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Duffy, Australian Capital Territory and Dunlop, Australian Capital Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Duffy has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Dunlop (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Duffy or Dunlop safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Duffy has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Dunlop scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Duffy scores 35/100 for bushfire risk. Dunlop scores 53/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Duffy or Dunlop?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Duffy has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.93% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
